meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no testing knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no testing knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Template to Solve No Testing Skills
content.seo_description: Master automated testing as a student. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional-grade software with confidence.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates the 'no testing' barrier by providing a pre-configured, modular architecture. By integrating Claude Code, you automate test generation, ensuring your codebase remains robust, scalable, and interview-ready. This approach transforms testing from a chore into a seamless component of your development workflow.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks architecting your dream feature, only to be paralyzed by the void of 'no testing.' The cursor blinks, the deadline looms, and the fear of shipping a brittle, bug-ridden application keeps you from pushing to production. You are not just building code; you are building your reputation as an engineer.

Relief has arrived. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain access to an industrial-strength scaffolding designed to turn testing into an automated reflex. No more guessing; just systematic, high-velocity development that turns your student project into a production-ready masterpiece.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory with the project template to ensure folder structure consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity boilerplate template with TypeScript, Vitest, and ESLint configurations.

steps.title: Define Business Logic Modules
steps.description: Isolate your core features into testable functions to prevent tight coupling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service module for user authentication that adheres to dependency injection principles.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create auth service with dependency injection'

steps.title: Automate Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan your logic and generate comprehensive unit test suites.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the auth service covering edge cases like invalid tokens and expired sessions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate vitest unit tests for auth.service.ts'

steps.title: Implement Integration Testing
steps.description: Verify that your database and API layers communicate correctly without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an integration test environment using an in-memory database to verify API endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'setup integration test suite with in-memory db'

steps.title: Enforce Continuous Quality Gates
steps.description: Configure the CI pipeline to block merges unless code coverage exceeds 80%.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs all tests and enforces a 80% coverage threshold.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate github actions ci workflow for test coverage'

pro_tips: Always write your tests before implementation logic; this 'Test-Driven' mindset prevents architectural bloat.
Use mock objects for external API calls to avoid hitting rate limits and incurring costs during development.
Keep your test files side-by-side with source files to maintain visual context while coding.
Run your test suite on every file save to catch regressions the second they are introduced.
Focus on testing behavior (what the user sees) rather than implementation details (how the function works).
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to a staging environment and document your testing coverage metrics in your portfolio to showcase professional rigor to future employers.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the same tools used by senior engineers to ship reliable, high-impact software. Stop worrying about bugs and start shipping features that matter. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
